title: River (Águas Purificadoras)
html: D Em/D There's a river, oh God D Em/D Flowing from your perfect love G D/F# Waters that flow from your holy throne G A4 A G/A Waters that wash me and make me whole D Em/D Wherever God’s river goes Bm7 A4 A It will bring healing and hope G D/F# The deserts springs flow with this flowing grace G Em A4 A G/B A/C# And this river is rounding here in this place D I want to drink G D D/F# From your river, oh God G D/F# Em A Satisfy this longing deep within’ my heart Bm7 G A I want to flow in your waters Bm7 F#m7 G I want to drink in your fountain A Where are living waters G/A D You are the fountain, oh God D Em/D There's a river, oh God D Em/D Flowing from your perfect love G D/F# Waters that flow from your holy throne G A4 A G/A Waters that wash me and make me whole D Em/D Wherever God’s river goes Bm7 A4 A It will bring healing and hope G D/F# The deserts springs flow with this flowing grace G Em A4 A G/B A/C# And this river is rounding here in this place D I want to drink G D D/F# From your river, oh God G D/F# Em A Satisfy this longing deep within’ my heart Bm7 G A I want to flow in your waters Bm7 F#m7 G I want to drink in your fountain A Where are living waters D You are the fountain, oh God D D4 You are the river, oh God Bm A D You are the fountain, oh God
